📦 Products & Variants
🏷️ Categories

📦 Add/Move Products

Tick any product to move it into this category. Untick a product that's currently in this category to send it back to Uncategorized. Products already in other categories show where they currently are.
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Customers
📢
Bulk Reminder Center
—
✖
No app can truly "blast" WhatsApp/SMS/Gmail to everyone in one tap — each service only allows sending to one person at a time. This screen lets you go through the list quickly, one tap per customer.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 New Customer

👤
↩️
Item Return
—
✖
Tick the item(s) being returned, then adjust the quantity and refund amount (reduce it if the item is damaged/used). Choose Cash or Wallet as the refund method, then tap Confirm Return — stock is restocked automatically and the amount is deducted from today's sales.
↩️
Supplier Item Return
—
✖
Set the return value yourself (admin rate). On save, the supplier's payable will be reduced and the item deducted from stock.

⚙️ Settings

💾 Storage Used

Calculating…

🔍 App Display Size

Make the whole app — icons, text, buttons — bigger or smaller. Useful for bigger screens or if you want larger text.
A A
100%

🎨 Theme & Appearance

As soon as you pick a colour, the whole app — buttons, header, sidebar, everything — instantly changes to that colour.
Colour Theme
Font Style

💵 Opening Cash Balance

Enter how much cash you actually had before you started using this app. The Dashboard's "Cash in Hand" starts from this number, then updates automatically with every real cash sale, collection, and payment — fully based on your actual records, no hidden numbers.

🧾 Bill & Print Settings moved!

Business Info, Printer, Receipt Content, and Print Text Size are now all together in one place — under 🛠️ Tools on the Home screen.

🧾 Tax Settings

Most retail shops in Pakistan don't add tax on the counter bill — leave this off unless your business specifically needs it. If you turn it on, this percentage is added as a separate line on every new bill going forward (past bills are unaffected).
Tax Percentage

💾 Backup Your Data

Since opening this file directly in Chrome doesn't reliably auto-save between sessions, use this instead: tap "Export" before closing the app to download a backup file, then tap "Import" next time you open the app to bring everything back.

💳 My Payment Accounts

These will be automatically included in every payment reminder you send to customers, so they can pay you directly without calling to ask for your account number.

🔐 Admin Control

Enter your app login PIN (the same one you use as Admin to open this app) to edit developer contact details.
Developer WhatsApp Number
Developer SMS Number
Developer Gmail
App Share Link
Paste your live GitHub Pages link here. The 📤 Share button on the Login and Home screens will send this link on WhatsApp/etc — update it anytime the link changes, and it updates everywhere automatically.
Write your own message here (e.g. "Our app is very good, please use it") — it will be sent along with the link above when the 📤 Share button is pressed.
Accounts to Receive Your Payments
Add as many as you like (EasyPaisa, JazzCash, Bank, etc). Customers will see these in Package Plans and can switch between them — useful if they don't have your default wallet.
Rate Per Day (Rs.)
Set this once — every customer's calculated price updates automatically. Change it anytime and everything recalculates immediately.
Package Plans (with fixed price per plan)
These appear as tappable plans for customers (e.g. 1 day, 1 month, 1 year). Set an exact price for each — useful when longer plans are discounted and don't follow the plain per-day rate. Leave price empty to auto-calculate from the per-day rate above.
One Admin PIN for Everything
This panel now unlocks with your app login PIN — no separate PIN to remember. To change it, go to Home → Users, tap the Admin user's ✏️ Set Custom PIN button, and enter your new PIN there.
🆘 PIN Recovery Setup
Set this up now, while you still have access — if you ever forget your Admin PIN, you'll be able to reset it yourself on the login screen by answering both of these correctly. No need to contact anyone. (For security, these two boxes always show blank when you reopen this screen — that does NOT mean they weren't saved.)

⚠️ Danger Zone

These actions cannot be undone. Export a backup first if you're unsure.
🧾 Reset Bills & Transactions
Clears all bills, purchase orders, customer/supplier balances, and Dashboard totals. Your Products, Categories, and current Stock quantities stay exactly as they are — so you can start fresh billing without re-entering your inventory.
🔥 Master Reset — Erase Everything
Wipes Products, Categories, Customers, Suppliers, Bills, everything — the app goes back to a completely blank, zero state, as if freshly installed. Your login PIN, subscription/activation, and app settings (theme, printer, business info) are NOT affected.
🧾 Bill & Print Settings

🏪 Business Info

This appears on printed bills. Leave blank to just show "AIO POS".

🖨️ Printer Settings

Printing works through your phone's own Print system. When you tap Print, Android shows every printer it knows about — Bluetooth thermal printers (via an app like RawBT), Sunmi's built-in printer, WiFi/USB printers, or "Save as PDF". If your printer doesn't appear, install its print-service app from Play Store once — after that it'll show up automatically here and in every other app.
Paper Width (for receipt layout)
Printing a full page instead? Just choose "A4" / "Fit to page" in the print dialog itself — the same bill works for both.
Invoice Style
A4 style uses your current theme color and font, with a signature line — best for formal invoices or sharing a polished bill on WhatsApp.

🧾 Receipt Content

Turn on whichever details you want to appear on every printed bill.

🔠 Print Text Size

Make the printed receipt's writing bigger or smaller across the board.
A A
100%

🏷️ Barcode Labels

Print a barcode sticker for any product — using the barcode number already saved on that product's variant. Useful for labeling shelves or items so a barcode scanner (or phone camera scanner app) can look them up quickly at checkout.
Building your poster…

🧾 Reset Bills & Transactions

This will permanently erase: all Bills, Purchase Orders, customer/supplier balances, and Dashboard totals. Products, Categories, and Stock will NOT be touched. This cannot be undone.
❌ Incorrect PIN, or please tick the checkbox above.

🔥 Master Reset — Erase Everything

This erases ALL Products, Categories, Customers, Suppliers, and Bills — the app goes back to completely blank/zero. This CANNOT be undone.
Type DELETE below to confirm.
❌ Please type DELETE exactly, and enter your correct PIN.

Preview

Tap the circle to add your photo (optional — shown on the shareable account card)

Enter the number of days you'd like — the price will be calculated automatically. Then tap "Chat with Developer" below to send your request.
